scripts.dev: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && bunx vite --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.start: bun run build && bunx electron dist/main.js
scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && bunx vite build
scripts.package:mac: bun run build && bunx electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win: bun run build && bunx electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:linux: bun run build && bunx electron-builder --linux --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
